name: Raisin-Oatmeal Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease a 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of oats over the bottom of the prepared pan and set aside.
4. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in sugar.
6. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
7. Stir together flour, remaining oats, raisins, baking soda, and salt.
8. Mix into the chocolate mixture.
9. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for about 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
12. Makes 24 brownies.
